_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Gallery Hover Carousel
_meta.description: This component is a dynamic, interactive gallery built with Shadcn UI and Tailwind CSS. Each card initially displays a full-background image, which smoothly shrinks to the top half on hover, revealing a text section with a title, subtitle, and arrow button. The layout is responsive, carousel-enabled, and visually engaging, perfect for showcasing content elegantly.
